data.name: Villainess Trainer
data.detailed_description:
Take the role of an enslaved barbarian that has lost his tribe due to attack by the empire. Purchased by an infamous villainess, a high noble of the empire, you're forced to submit to her due to a magic ring binding you to her.

On an oversea journey, the ship gets attacked and the villainess falls into the ocean. You dive in to save her, and in the process, remove the ring binding you to her. Free from her control, you end up on a desert island together, where the power dynamic is now reversed. She needs you to protect and provide for her, but you haven't forgotten how she's treated you. And her haughty attitude remains. Something that you intend to address.

The game features survival mechanics. Gather resources by mining, foraging, logging, hunting, and fishing. Build and upgrade your base. Craft items and equipment to prepare against the many monsters that threaten your camp. And all the while, don't forget to cook and feed yourself and the villainess. The game features QTE turn-based combat with RPG elements of stat upgrades, as well as a fishing mini game.

The adult content revolves around BDSM relationship you build with the female lead that buds into romance as you live and survive together on the island. The dating sim features feeding and gifting mechanic to progress the relationship.

data.short_description: Survival, crafting, adult dating sim on a desert island, featuring domination loss and role reversal, as you turn the table on the villainess that once enslaved and dominated you.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
